query: Get comprehensive company profile data for the company named "DCG Technical Solutions, LLC". The company's official website domain is dcgla.com — use this for disambiguation and to ensure you are searching for the correct company. Gather information from LinkedIn, G2, Reddit, and other reliable sources. Include company details, reviews, industry codes (UNSPSC, NAICS, ISIC), and market sentiment.
answer:
## Executive Summary
DCG Technical Solutions, LLC is a privately held IT consulting and managed service provider (MSP) based in Los Angeles, California, founded in 1993. The company was acquired in 2020 as a founding member of the New Charter Technologies platform, though it continues to operate under its local brand identity. DCG generates approximately $4 million in annual revenue and maintains a strong market reputation, highlighted by positive customer sentiment regarding its cybersecurity compliance, ransomware recovery, and onsite IT support.

## Company Overview & Financials
*   **Headquarters:** 600 W 7th St Ste 550, Los Angeles, CA 90017, United States [IT Consulting Los Angeles | Trusted IT Partner Since 1993 | DCG](https://dcgla.com/). The company also operates internet data centers in Los Angeles and Las Vegas [DCG Technical Solutions, LLC | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/dcg-technical-solutions-llc).
*   **Leadership:** The executive team includes Brent Whitefield (Owner and CEO) [MSP 501 Profile: DCG Technical Solutions on the Managed Services Pivot](https://www.channelfutures.com/technologies/msp-501-profile-dcg-technical-solutions-on-the-managed-services-pivot), John Angelotti (President) [IT Consulting Los Angeles | Trusted IT Partner Since 1993 | DCG](https://dcgla.com/), and Tommy Clark (Chief Information Security Officer) [DCG Technical Solutions, LLC Information](https://rocketreach.co/dcg-technical-solutions-llc-profile_b5ff32c4f71af4ee). 
*   **Size and Revenue:** DCG employs 35 people [DCG Technical Solutions, LLC | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/dcg-technical-solutions-llc), fitting within the 11-50 employee range reported by industry platforms [Working at DCG Technical Solutions | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-DCG-Technical-Solutions-EI_IE4549452.11,34.htm). In 2025, the company reported an annual revenue of $4 million [DCG Technical Solutions, LLC Information](https://rocketreach.co/dcg-technical-solutions-llc-profile_b5ff32c4f71af4ee).
*   **Core Services:** The firm specializes in IT support, PrivateCLOUD hosting, and computer networking products [DCG Technical Solutions, LLC | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/dcg-technical-solutions-llc). It is a Microsoft Certified Partner for Networking Infrastructure Solutions and an authorized reseller for VMWare, Citrix, StorageCraft, Sonicwall, and Dell [DCG Technical Solutions, LLC | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/dcg-technical-solutions-llc). DCG differentiates itself by offering "month-to-month" service programs without requiring long-term contracts [IT Consulting Los Angeles | Trusted Since 1993 | DCG Technical Solutions](https://www.dcgla.com/).

## Corporate Structure & Acquisition
DCG Technical Solutions operates as a New Charter Technologies Company [IT Consulting Los Angeles | Trusted IT Partner Since 1993 | DCG](https://dcgla.com/). 
*   **Acquisition Timeline:** DCG was acquired by New Charter Technologies in 2020, though sources conflict on the exact month; PitchBook reports March 27, 2020 [DCG Technical Solutions 2026 Company Profile: Valuation, Investors, Acquisition | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/143260-84), while Preqin reports August 2020 [DCG Technical Solutions, LLC Asset Profile | Preqin](https://www.preqin.com/data/profile/asset/dcg-technical-solutions--llc/400561).
*   **Platform Foundation:** DCG was one of four founding members of the New Charter platform, alongside PennComp, ActiveCo, and Apex [About Us | Who We Are | New Charter Technologies](https://www.newchartertech.com/about/). 
*   **Financial Backing:** New Charter Technologies is backed by Oval Partners, a Palo Alto-based private equity firm [New Charter Technologies Enters Equity Partnership With Systems Solutions - | news | ChannelE2E](https://www.channele2e.com/news/new-charter-systems-solutions). The equity partnership model allows MSP owners to reinvest into a single class of shares alongside the private equity firm [New Charter Technologies and Private Equity Firm Oval Partners Launch a New Category of Managed Service Provider (MSP)](https://www.newchartertech.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/NewCharterRelease2020.8.pdf).
*   **Post-Acquisition Strategy:** Despite the acquisition, DCG maintains its local brand identity [Media | DCG Technical Solutions](https://www.dcgla.com/media/). The company utilizes the partnership to collaborate on resources, such as specialized training programs with sister company Greystone Technology [Cypress Grove: Unleash Your Potential with Personalized Training | DCG Technical Solutions](https://www.dcgla.com/cypress-grove-powering-productivity-with-one-on-one-training/), and aimed to use acquisition resources to expand its geographic footprint into the Eastern U.S. market by 2023 [DCG Technical Solutions, LLC Asset Profile | Preqin](https://www.preqin.com/data/profile/asset/dcg-technical-solutions--llc/400561).

## Industry Classifications
DCG Technical Solutions is classified under several official and platform-specific industry codes:
*   **NAICS Codes:** Primary codes include 541519 and 541512. Additional associated NAICS codes are 51, 518, 5182, 51821, 518210, 54, 541, 5415, and 54151 [DCG Technical Solutions - Global Providers Directory](https://www.connectbase.com/provider/dcg-technical-solutions/).
*   **SIC Codes:** Primary codes are 7379 and 7374. Additional codes include 73, 737, and 7373 [DCG Technical Solutions - Global Providers Directory](https://www.connectbase.com/provider/dcg-technical-solutions/).
*   **Platform Classifications:** 
    *   *LinkedIn:* Computer Networking Products [DCG Technical Solutions, LLC | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/dcg-technical-solutions-llc)
    *   *ZoomInfo:* Business Services, Custom Software & IT Services [Contact John Angelotti, Email: j***@dcgla.com & Phone Number | President at DCG Technical Solutions - ZoomInfo](https://www.zoominfo.com/p/John-Angelotti/1873533227)
    *   *Yelp:* Local Services, IT Services & Computer Repair [Dcg Technical Solutions Reviews | Read Customer Service Reviews of dcgla.com](https://www.yelp.com/brands/dcg-technical-solutions)
    *   *MapQuest:* Anomalously classifies the Glendale and La Canada Flintridge locations under "Furniture Stores," "Office Furniture," and "Electronics Store" [DCG Technical Solutions, 1043 Foothill Blvd, La Canada Flintridge, CA 91011, US - MapQuest](https://www.mapquest.com/us/california/dcg-technical-solutions-350541374).

## Market Sentiment & Customer Reviews
Market sentiment for DCG Technical Solutions is highly positive across multiple B2B and consumer review platforms, with strong praise for individual engineering staff. 

*   **Yelp:** The company holds an average rating of 4.6 stars based on 11 reviews across 4 locations [Dcg Technical Solutions Reviews | Read Customer Service Reviews of dcgla.com](https://www.yelp.com/brands/dcg-technical-solutions). Customers specifically praised staff members Gabriel (Gabe), Joe, Benny, Theo, and Ian C. for proactive service, ransomware recovery, and CMMC compliance implementation [DCG TECHNICAL SOLUTIONS - Updated May 2026 - 11 Reviews - 600 W 7th St, Los Angeles, California - IT Services & Computer Repair - Phone Number - Yelp](https://www.yelp.com/biz/dcg-technical-solutions-los-angeles-3). 
*   **Reddit:** On the `r/msp` subreddit, DCG is recommended as a "fantastic" provider for "remote hands" in Los Angeles. A user named Museskate also endorsed the company, noting they were a "good employer" [r/msp on Reddit: Remote Hands in LA](https://www.reddit.com/r/msp/comments/137qz40/remote_hands_in_la/).
*   **Glassdoor:** The company has a 3.9-star rating based on 3 employee reviews [Working at DCG Technical Solutions | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-DCG-Technical-Solutions-EI_IE4549452.11,34.htm).
*   **Other Platforms:** Cloudtango features a review from Westport Construction, Inc. calling DCG a "fast, competent and unquestionably dependable IT solutions provider," noting a partnership dating back to 2002 [DCG Technical Solutions, LLC Client Reviews](https://www.cloudtango.net/providers/1258/dcg-technical-solutions). The company's Facebook page has 23,210 likes [DCG Technical Solutions, Inc. | Los Angeles CA | Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/ITSupportLosAngeles/).
*   **Negative Sentiment:** One highly critical Yelp review from a customer (Bryan F.) described the company as "unethical" and "borderline crooks," alleging that DCG charged his bank account without warning and billed for phone calls required to fix their own errors [DCG TECHNICAL SOLUTIONS - Updated May 2026 - 11 Reviews - 600 W 7th St, Los Angeles, California - IT Services & Computer Repair - Phone Number - Yelp](https://www.yelp.com/biz/dcg-technical-solutions-los-angeles-3).

## Gaps and Limitations
*   **ISIC and UNSPSC Codes:** While the findings note that NAICS codes are generally compatible with ISIC and cross-referenced with UNSPSC, specific ISIC and UNSPSC codes assigned directly to DCG Technical Solutions were not available in the provided data.
*   **G2 Reviews:** No customer reviews or profile data from the G2 platform were present in the research findings.
*   **Eastern U.S. Expansion:** The findings state DCG aimed to expand into the Eastern U.S. by 2023, but there is no data confirming whether this expansion was successfully executed.
